title: Better Aquamirae Combat
body:
## 📜 Description
Better Aquamirae Combat offers compatibility between Aquamirae weapons and Better Combat.

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/pixel-dream-studios-872788557553610802)!

## 🧩 Dependencies
- [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

## 💼 Partner
